mapper.select: SELECT * FROM prize_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND prize_date = #{prizeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `prize_record` WHERE `create_time` BETWEEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 MINUTE) AND NOW()
SELECT * FROM `prize_record` WHERE `create_time` BETWEEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 MINUTE) AND NOW()
